channel.title: Nuro Optimizer
channel.description: Most recent updates to Nuro Optimizer

item.title: Nuro Optimizer 1.0.7
item.description:
What's new in 1.0.7

  • Sparkle auto-updates — the app will now check for new versions automatically
  • App Uninstaller — remove apps and every leftover support file in one move (everything goes to Trash, fully reversible)
  • Menu bar app — live CPU, memory, disk, and load right in your menu bar with quick actions for Purge Memory and Flush DNS
  • Time Machine snapshot reclamation — the Optimizer now reclaims hidden local snapshots that silently eat disk space

See the full release notes at github.com/DonteWong/nuro-optimizer-releases.
